ops.title: Release ccx: ship watch-all overhaul is on main but unreleased
ops.description: The per-run CI report / watch-all / streaming ship (976af726 + 2f7c6d7d) exists only on cc-context main; brew ccx is still v0.10.0 with the old single-run ship (prints just the summary line, watches one unfiltered run). Fleet adoption of the new contract — and the guides wording shipped in cc-skills 9d162c48 — is misleading until a release cuts a new formula. Release flow per AGENTS.md § Releases (tag on main, bump plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json, lockstep capt-hook.toml already at 0.3.0).

ops.text: brew-installed ccx vcs ship prints per-run workflow · conclusion · duration · url report lines
